en.description_en: The sanmon (main gate) of Kōtoku-ji temple. Town-designated as a tangible cultural property (structure) by Daigo Town.

items.name: 大雲寺観音堂（附属大般若経・附属宝篋印塔

en.name_en: Kannon hall of Daiun-ji temple, with attached Great Wisdom Sutra and Hōkyōin stupa
en.description_en: The Kannon-dō (Kannon hall) of Daiun-ji temple, together with an attached set of the Daihannyakyō and a Hōkyōin stone stupa. Town-designated as a tangible cultural property (structure) by Daigo Town.
A nehan-zu, a painting depicting the death (parinirvāṇa) of Shakyamuni Buddha. Town-designated as a tangible cultural property (painting) by Daigo Town.
A wooden seated sculpture of Amida Nyorai (Amitābha Buddha). Town-designated as a tangible cultural property (sculpture) by Daigo Town.

en.name_en: Wooden standing statue of Prince Shōtoku
en.description_en: A wooden standing statue of Prince Shōtoku (Shōtoku Taishi). Town-designated as a tangible cultural property (sculpture) by Daigo Town.

en.name_en: Clay seated statue of Saint Nyoshin
en.description_en: A clay (sozō) seated statue of the priest Nyoshin. Town-designated as a tangible cultural property (sculpture) by Daigo Town.
A wooden seated sculpture of Kannon Bosatsu (Avalokiteśvara). Town-designated as a tangible cultural property (sculpture) by Daigo Town.

items.name: 仲山古墳群3号墳出土遺物(直刀・刀子・鎌)
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.name_romaji: Nakayama Kofungun 3-gōfun Shutsudo Ibutsu (Chokutō, Tōsu, Kama)
en.name_en: Artifacts from Mound No. 3 of the Nakayama tumulus cluster (straight sword, knife, sickle)
en.description_en: Artifacts excavated from Mound No. 3 of the Nakayama tumulus cluster, including a straight sword (chokutō), a knife (tōsu), and a sickle (kama). Town-designated as a monument (historic site) by Daigo Town.

en.name_en: Nakataue rice-planting rite of Chikatsu Shrine
en.description_en: The nakataue, a ritual rice-planting observance held at Chikatsu Shrine. Town-designated as an intangible folk cultural property by Daigo Town.
A stone monument dedicated to Dōsojin, a roadside guardian deity. Town-designated as a tangible cultural property (archaeological material) by Daigo Town.
A kuyōtō memorial pagoda associated with the Kōshin folk faith. Town-designated as a tangible cultural property (archaeological material) by Daigo Town.

en.name_en: Library collection of the Bunbukan academy
en.description_en: The bunko (document and book collection) of the Bunbukan academy. Town-designated as a tangible cultural property (old document) by Daigo Town.

items.name: 鏡城址
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: The ruins of Kagami Castle. Town-designated as a monument (historic site) by Daigo Town.

items.name: 上岡古墳群
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: The Kamioka tumulus cluster, a group of ancient burial mounds. Town-designated as a monument (historic site) by Daigo Town.

items.name: 如信上人終焉の地
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.name_en: Place of death of Saint Nyoshin
en.description_en: The site marking the place of death of the priest Nyoshin. Town-designated as a monument (historic site) by Daigo Town.

items.name: 文武館跡のけやき群
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.name_en: Zelkova grove at the Bunbukan academy site
en.description_en: A grove of keyaki (Japanese zelkova) trees at the site of the Bunbukan academy. Town-designated as a monument (natural monument) by Daigo Town.

items.name: だき灯籠の杉
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: A sugi (Japanese cedar) tree known as the Dakidōrō no Sugi. Town-designated as a monument (natural monument) by Daigo Town.

items.name: ヒメザゼンソウの群落
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.name_en: Colony of dwarf skunk cabbage (Symplocarpus nipponicus)
en.description_en: A natural colony of himezazensō (dwarf skunk cabbage, Symplocarpus nipponicus). Town-designated as a monument (natural monument) by Daigo Town.

items.name: サクラソウの群落
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: A natural colony of sakurasō (Japanese primrose, Primula sieboldii). Town-designated as a monument (natural monument) by Daigo Town.

items.name: 法龍寺のカヤ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: A kaya (Japanese nutmeg-yew) tree at Hōryū-ji temple. Town-designated as a monument (natural monument) by Daigo Town.

items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
